description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: In the event that less extreme measures are not adequate to address the capital shortfall, Core GovOps may seek to put the Prime Agent into conservatorship, in which case

direct control of the Prime Agent to maximize value for Sky and other Prime Agent stakeholders. Seeking to put a Prime Agent into conservatorship requires immediate escalation to Sky Core Governance and requires an expedited Executive Vote as specified in [A.1.
